name: Centara Ao Nang Beach Resort & Spa Krabi
detail: Our stay at Centara Aonang was just amazing. We do not unterstand why this is just a 4 Star and not a 5 Star hotel. The hotel has not just a welcome Drink and a luggage Service, it has also a pillow menu and in-room Fitness accesoires (like a gymball). The rooms are large and clean and we had a nice view to the Pool and the big Rocks. The Pool is huge and totally relaxed. This is the only hotel in the area with direct beach access and to sit on those cosy chairs or sunbeds during the sunset is amazing. The breakfast buffet is various and huge. Every taste can find something: There is as well Thai breakfast as International breakfast. The Cocktails at the bar have normal prices for a hotel and in the afternoon you have a happy hour. The staff is totally friendly and help regarding every question. They also offer a sports program. Three (really) little things which could be improved: - the daily cleaning in the rooms could be better - the beds looked really carelessly and not nice. They didnt change used glasses and cupboards. - They should try to get the flies out of the buffet room. - We could not find any sockets in the bathroom (e.g. for hair drying or shaving) Besides this small possiblee improvements we had an amazing stay and would definetely come back again.

name: Balcony Party Hostel Ao Nang Beachfront Adult Only
detail: Location is superb, right in front of the beach. 7-Eleven and Family mart nearby. A bit far to get halal food near the mosque, but at night sometimes got halal food stall parked at the road. Not so noisy in my opinion, but maybe my ears are too adapt with high noise pollution from work, different people different perspective. The toilets are 5-star quality. 4-bed room are spacious. View from balcony was mesmerizing as it point towards the sunset. Next trip to Krabi will definitely book here again. Kudos!

name: VARANA Krabi Hotel
detail: This resort was so so amazing and I got a great impression.

name: Anana Ecological Resort Krabi
detail: I would say Anana has provided a quality service to me and my girlfriend, the environment was chill and nice (except the shuttle bus was very limited) but getting tutu to the Ao Nang Beach is around 200 baht. The service at Anana was up to point and I would like to especially thank Rut and Ree for their service, with their warm greetings and helpful advice I had a great time at Krabi, e.g. they will tell us where is the best place to get local food and they would call tutu and communicate with the driver for us. We had a great experience at Anana for 6 days.

name: BlueSotel SMART Krabi Aonang Beach - Adults only
detail: Amazing hotel with great rooftop pool, super clean and extremely comfortable rooms, delicious breakfasts. The staff is amazing in both Blue Sotel Smart and Blue Sotel Krabi- thank you for heloping me get to the right hotel. I truly enjoyed my stay there. It is the best hitel I have ever visited. Also, the staff follows highest standards, everyone is kind and helpful! They also helped me with my cancelled flight. purely amazing, immaculate, I highly recommend!

name: Krabi Resort
detail: We decided to spend songkran down at a beach location, and I had never been to Krabi before. When deciding on a Krabi hotel, I wanted a decent sized resort in a central location, that was right on the beach. Krabi Resort ticked all those boxes. When I arrived, I quickly determined that I had picked the optimal resort for the area as Krabi resort was the most centrally located, and one of only a very few that had direct access to the beach. The reason is the resort is one of the originals for the area, but the over the years it has expanded a lot, meaning you can choose between a lot of accommodation options, eg hotel style rooms, or semi detached rooms, to fully detached villas with their own private pool. The resort itself is large and they drive you to your room after you check in. Facilities include two pool areas (one done like a pirate ship), a fantastic gym, large scale chess board with pieces set up, multiple restaurants, mini golf, bicycles for rent, beach, massage etc.

name: Sugar Marina Hotel CLIFFHANGER Aonang
detail: the best hotel. All the staff are great n friendly very welcoming too. Ms Kai was the first Sugar Marina staff whom attended to us, couldnt remember when was the first time then. Her friendlinest and warmth has made us come back for the 2nd time and so on through our 3rd and 4th stay. There was a thoughts to change and try out other hotel in Krabi but our heart still fall for Sugar Marina Cliffhanger and ended up we chose to stay here again. Last month we went to Phuket and stayed at Sugar Marina Nautical in Kata beach. it was nice too. My partner and me love our stay there in Phuket, but we still love and njoy more in Sugar Marina in Krabi. We just love Krabi so much. We will coming back for Krabi for our short gateway as and when we can. Thank you Krabi and Sugar Marina Cliff hanger for the wonderful moments and great stay. Hope your business will always prosperous n bless.

name: Avani Ao Nang Cliff Krabi Resort
detail: Cliff Beach is a really good value for the money. By Western standards it would be a 3-4 star hotel. In Krabi it was really helpful to stay at this kind of place because the staff was very willing to help out with booking the various kinds of trips that travelers come to Ao Nang to take. These are generally booked through an agency anyway (who charters their own boat in Thailand?) so why not have it at a convenient location you can get to by just rolling out of bed? The weather was unpredictable when we were there so it was nice to have a comfortable, DRY! home base that we could retreat to. They also make sure that there are always fresh bottles of water in your room. How sweet. Definitely try the drinks but avoid the creepy in-house Activity Director/Muay Thai instructor.

name: Base Party Hostel 18-35 Years Old Only
detail: Greatly done pool party’s day trips and nightly activity’s.

name: The Palace Aonang Resort
detail: The location close to the beach, and the staff are perfect.
